title: Program Manager
summary: Lead cross-functional delivery of federal broadband and IT programs. Coordinate teams, manage timelines, and serve as the primary interface between ValorForge and government stakeholders.
responsibilities: Manage program schedules, milestones, risks, and deliverables
Serve as primary point of contact for federal agency stakeholders
Coordinate across engineering, compliance, and executive teams
Prepare and present program status reviews and executive briefings
Ensure adherence to federal contract requirements and quality standards
Support proposal development and capture management efforts
qualifications: 5+ years program or project management experience in federal IT or telecom
PMP, PgMP, or equivalent certification preferred
Direct experience with federal contract lifecycle (FAR/DFARS)
Strong written and verbal communication skills
preferred: Experience with FCC Broadband Data Collection or Fabric programs
Familiarity with CMMC 2.0 compliance and NIST 800-171
Experience managing SDVOSB or small business set-aside contracts
compensation: Competitive salary, comprehensive health coverage, 401(k), flexible PTO
